title: Pseudo Anonymised X-Rays from Questionnaire R0
description: Variables from the x-rays section of the first round of questionnaire for The Generations Study about the participant's history of x-rays. This data has been pseudo-anonymised by removing any personal identifiable information (PII) and shifting dates from their original data.

R0_ChestLungXray.x-question: Have you ever had an X-ray to your chest or lungs (such as for asthma or tuberculosis)?
R0_ChestLungXray.description: Whether the participant has ever had a chest or lung X-ray

R0_ChestXray_Num.description: Number of X-ray examination or treatment that has been filled out in the questionnaire

R0_ChestXray.description: Total chest X-rays the participant received at age range specified.

R0_SpineClavicleNeckXray.x-question: Have you ever had an X-ray to your spine, collar bone, or neck?
R0_SpineClavicleNeckXray.description: Whether the participant has had spine/collarbone/neck X-rays

R0_BariumSwallowXray.x-question: Have you ever had a barium swallow?
R0_BariumSwallowXray.description: Whether the participant has undergone a barium swallow X-ray

R0_EsophagusStomachXray.x-question: Have you had an X-ray to your oesophagus or stomach, without a barium swallow?
R0_EsophagusStomachXray.description: Whether the participant has had esophageal/stomach X-rays without barium

R0_CoronaryAngiogram.x-question: Have you had a coronary angiogram or angioplasty?
R0_CoronaryAngiogram.description: Whether the participant has undergone coronary angiography/angioplasty

R0_LungStomachArteriogram.x-question: Have you had an arteriogram of the lung or stomach?
R0_LungStomachArteriogram.description: Whether the participant has had lung/stomach arteriograms

R0_CTChestNeckScan.x-question: Have you had a CT or CAT scan of the chest or neck?
R0_CTChestNeckScan.description: Whether the participant has had chest/neck CT/CAT scans

R0_GallbladderXray.x-question: Have you had an X-ray of your gall bladder (cholecystogram)?
R0_GallbladderXray.description: Whether the participant has had gallbladder X-rays

R0_KidneyPyelogramXray.x-question: Have you had an intravenous pyelogram X-ray of kidneys?
R0_KidneyPyelogramXray.description: Whether the participant has had kidney pyelogram X-rays

R0_FullMouthDentalXray.x-question: Have you had a full-mouth (panoramic) dental X-ray?
R0_FullMouthDentalXray.description: Whether the participant has had panoramic dental X-rays

R0_SingleSideDentalXray.x-question: Have you had a large dental X-ray for all teeth on one side of your head?
R0_SingleSideDentalXray.description: Whether the participant has had single-side dental X-rays

R0_FluoroscopicChestXray.x-question: Have you had a fluoroscopic chest X-ray after tuberculosis?
R0_FluoroscopicChestXray.description: Whether the participant has had post-TB fluoroscopic chest X-rays

R0_ChestNeckRadiotherapy.x-question: Have you had chest or neck radiotherapy for Hodgkins disease or other cancer?
R0_ChestNeckRadiotherapy.description: Whether the participant received chest/neck radiotherapy for cancer

R0_ChestNeckRadiationOther.x-question: Have you had radiation treatment to the chest or neck for other conditions?
R0_ChestNeckRadiationOther.description: Whether the participant received chest/neck radiation for non-cancer conditions

R0_Xray_Num.description: Number of X-ray examination or treatment that has been filled out in the questionnaire

R0_XrayAge.description: Age at time of X-ray for any extra X-ray

R0_XRayDate_Shifted.name: R0_XRayDate_Shifted
R0_XRayDate_Shifted.description: Derived and pseudo-anonymised month/year. Month and year components are combined into a date with day 15, then shifted by a participant-specific offset, and only the year and month of the shifted date are stored. If the month component is missing (and a year is present) the date is anchored at 1 July (day 1, month 7) of that year before shifting. If the year component is missing the derived value is null.

R0_XrayFromAge.x-question: X-ray occurred from the age of
R0_XrayFromAge.description: X-ray occurred from the age of for any extra X-ray

R0_XrayToAge.x-question: X-ray occurred to the age of
R0_XrayToAge.description: X-ray occurred to the age of for any extra X-ray

R0_XRay_RangeStart_Shifted.name: R0_XRay_RangeStart_Shifted
R0_XRay_RangeStart_Shifted.description: Derived and pseudo-anonymised month/year. Month and year components are combined into a date with day 15, then shifted by a participant-specific offset, and only the year and month of the shifted date are stored. If the month component is missing (and a year is present) the date is anchored at 1 July (day 1, month 7) of that year before shifting. If the year component is missing the derived value is null.

R0_XRay_RangeEnd_Shifted.name: R0_XRay_RangeEnd_Shifted
R0_XRay_RangeEnd_Shifted.description: Derived and pseudo-anonymised month/year. Month and year components are combined into a date with day 15, then shifted by a participant-specific offset, and only the year and month of the shifted date are stored. If the month component is missing (and a year is present) the date is anchored at 1 July (day 1, month 7) of that year before shifting. If the year component is missing the derived value is null.

R0_XrayMoreEvents.x-question: If you have done more X-ray examinations or radiation treatments, cross this box
R0_XrayMoreEvents.description: Whether the participant has additional X-ray events not listed

R0_XrayMoreThanTwelve.x-question: Have had more than twelve x-ray events
R0_XrayMoreThanTwelve.description: Whether the participant has had more than 12 X-ray events
